<!-- generated by bootstrap-agents-md v1.1.0 -->

# Code Style & Patterns

Detailed coding conventions and common patterns for this codebase.

## Package Manager

- pnpm (`pnpm-lock.yaml`, `pnpm-workspace.yaml`)

## TypeScript Configuration

- `strict: true`, `noEmit` â€” types checked via `pnpm typecheck`
- Path alias `@/*` maps to the repo root (`@/lib/utils`, `@/components/site-header`)
- `catalog/` is **excluded** from TypeScript â€” agent `.ts` files there are content, not app code

## Formatting

- Prettier: no semicolons, double quotes, 2-space indent, 80 print width, LF
- `prettier-plugin-tailwindcss` sorts classes; it knows about `cn` and `cva` (see `.prettierrc`)
- Run `pnpm format` before committing

## Naming Conventions

- **Files**: kebab-case (`site-header.tsx`, `listing-card.tsx`, `button-link.tsx`)
- **Types**: PascalCase `type` aliases, not interfaces (`AgentListing`, `ComposerSelection` in `lib/catalog/types.ts`, `lib/composer/storage.ts`)
- **Functions/Variables**: camelCase (`getAgentsByCategory`, `integrationLabel`)
- **Constants**: SCREAMING_SNAKE or PascalCase objects (`STORAGE_KEY`, `CATALOG_ROOT`, `SITE`)

## Imports

- Named exports everywhere; no default exports outside Next.js conventions (pages, layouts, route handlers)
- `import type` for type-only imports (`import type { Metadata } from "next"`)
- Grouping: external packages first, then `@/` internal imports; imports always at the top of the module, never inline
- Node builtins use the `node:` prefix (`node:fs/promises`)

## Types

- No `any` â€” data read from disk is cast once at the boundary (`JSON.parse(raw) as Registry` in `lib/catalog/index.ts`) and typed from there
- No validation library; `catalog/registry.json` is trusted repo content

## Error Handling

- Route handlers return `NextResponse.json({ error }, { status })` for bad input / not found (see `app/api/composer/export/route.ts`)
- Data-access helpers return `null` for missing entries (`getAgent`, `getExtension`); pages handle `null` with `notFound()`

## Testing

- No test runner is configured. Verification = `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build`

## Next.js Patterns

- This repo runs Next 16 â€” read `node_modules/next/dist/docs/` before writing framework code (see the rules block in `AGENTS.md`)
- Route handler / page `params` are Promises: `const { slug } = await context.params` (see `app/api/agents/[slug]/file/route.ts`)
- Fonts load via `next/font/google` in `app/layout.tsx` and are exposed as CSS variables (`--font-dm-sans`, `--font-bricolage`, `--font-plex-mono`)
- Styling conventions live in [DESIGN.md](../../DESIGN.md)
